dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.utils

Class Storage

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.utils.Storage
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IStorage

    public class Storage
extends Object
implements IStorage
    The storage is used to store variables that can be used in the gui. The vars can be loaded in from the config, witch is saved by the vars from the constructor of the gui. When the gui is opened a new storage is created, witch is a copy of the storage from the gui. Just remember that the original storage is not cloned it is just a reference to the storage from the gui. So be careful when you change the original vars in the storage.
